description.value:
Requirements You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Hidden] to at least one enemy.

You can strike fear into those you stalk simply by letting them know that you can see them, but they can't see you. You [[/act sneak]] or [[/act hide]] and verbally mock a single creature within 30 feet from whom you're hidden. Your Stealth check against that target's Perception DC gains the following success and failure results in addition to its usual results.

Critical Success The target you mock becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. The target can't reduce its frightened condition below 1 until 1 minute passes or until it observes you (whichever comes first).

Success The target you mock becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Observed] to the target you mock.
